meta.description: A design system rooted in Japanese aesthetics — balancing Minimal restraint (侘寂 Wabi-Sabi), Bold expression (力 Chikara), Luxury refinement (雅 Miyabi), and Playful spirit (遊 Asobi).

base.responsibility: Theme, root variables, typography, document-level elements

utility.responsibility: Helpers, animations, responsive utilities, state toggles

darkModeRule.description: Dark mode must preserve hue identity and chroma consistency; only lightness may change.

optionalChaining.description: Use ?. when traversing optional DOM/state/data references

nullishCoalescing.description: Use ?? / ??= for null or undefined fallback only

destructuring.description: Use destructuring for dataset, options, event payloads, and state access

defaultingRule.description: Use ?? instead of || when false, 0, and empty string are valid values

domAccess.rule: Optional chaining must be used when queried elements may not exist.

datasetAccess.rule: Prefer destructuring from dataset with nullish fallback.

immutableUpdate.rule: Use spread syntax for state and collection updates.

arrayClone.rule: Avoid in-place mutation when updating UI state collections.

optionsMerge.rule: Merge user options with defaults using destructuring + spread.

nullishDefault.rule: Use ?? instead of || when 0, '', or false are valid.

color._description: All palette values are defined in OKLCH. Semantic dark mode values preserve C and h while adjusting L only. Dark surfaces are tuned for readability-first near-black UI.

semantic._description: Purpose-driven color assignments. All CSS variables should be emitted from :root and use light-dark(). Dark mode is tuned to prioritize readable neutral surfaces, softer whites, and solid neutral borders.

typography._description: Editorial scale rooted in Japanese typographic tradition. Added compact SaaS-oriented UI scale for product usage.

accent.value: 'Zen Kaku Gothic New', 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif

spacing._description: 8px base grid with Japanese-inspired naming (間 Ma — the beauty of space)

sm.value: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text-primary) 8%, transparent), 0 1px 4px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text-primary) 6%, transparent)

md.value: 0 2px 4px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text-primary) 8%, transparent), 0 4px 12px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text-primary) 10%, transparent)

lg.value: 0 4px 8px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text-primary) 8%, transparent), 0 8px 24px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text-primary) 12%, transparent)

xl.value: 0 8px 16px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text-primary) 10%, transparent), 0 16px 48px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text-primary) 14%, transparent)

gold.value: 0 4px 16px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-accent) 18%, transparent), 0 1px 4px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-accent) 12%, transparent)

animation._description: Motion inspired by 能 Noh — deliberate, graceful, purposeful

inkDrop.value: scale(0), opacity:0 -> scale(1), opacity:1 via radial expansion

components._description: Component specifications with compact SaaS-oriented UI density and accessibility-aware disabled states.

indicatorGapEnd.description: Extra space to the right of chevron-down icon

indicatorPaddingInlineEnd.description: Room for icon plus right-side breathing space

decorative.description: 波 Nami — traditional wave pattern divider

colorIndependence.description: Information not conveyed by color alone

darkModeGuidelines._description: Operational guidance for visually comfortable dark mode.
darkModeGuidelines.backgroundStrategy: Use near-black surfaces with small lightness steps between layers.

textUsage.primary: Use for all body copy and essential labels.
textUsage.secondary: Use for metadata, helper text, and supporting information only.
textUsage.tertiary: Use only for placeholders, disabled text, and low-priority chrome; never for body copy.

disabledStates._description: Disabled UI should remain legible and should not rely on opacity alone.
